Author: Microsoft Developer
Description:
What would you do with $25? Priya and Shireesh have some fun answers. You can also build a fully professional AI app in less! Check out Budget Bytes to see exactly how to do it using SQL Database. No big budget required.

🚀Budget Bytes Playlist: https://aka.ms/BudgetBytesPlaylist 🚀Visit the Repo: https://aka.ms/budgetbytes 🚀Get started for FREE: https://aka.ms/budgetbytes/freeoffer
Title: Budget Bytes: Azure Data Leaders on AI & Budget (Sneak Peek)
